The '''''Agave''-class picket ship''' was a tactical/operational reconnaissance ship produced under the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[New Class Modernization Program]]. Task force commanders sent these ships ahead of the main battlegroup to either scout quietly, or in force. They were assigned to the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]].

==Characteristics==
''Agave''-class pickets were equipped with Class 1 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]], powerful sensors, a good stealth package, and shotgun hypertransceivers which allowed them to report information back to the battlegroup with a minimal risk of detection. Some also apparently have [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] generators, as was used by the armada chasing the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. In the event of detection, an ''Agave''-class ship could quickly jump into the safety of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. ''Agave''-class picket ships' sublight engines provided moderate speed, but were capable of dealing with enemy patrols.

Following New Class focus on efficiency, the basic hull and systems of the ''Agave''-class was also used for the [[Warrior-class gunship|''Warrior''-class]].

==Behind the scenes==
The only official image of the ''Agave''-class picket ship is found in the RPG sourcebook ''Cracken's Threat Dossier''. Like the pictures of other New Class ships, this picture contradicts information from the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] novels, on which ''Cracken's Threat Dossier'' is based. The ''Warrior'' and ''Agave''-classes look nothing alike, even though they are supposed to be built on the same hull.
